title: SP-PINN-RelativisticDynamics: Reference Implementation for Symmetry-Preserving Relativistic Charged-Particle Integration
description: Reproducibility package for the SP-PINN framework (Akintsov, Nevecheria, Yuan, Igumnov, Andreev, Qin; Symmetry, MDPI, 2026): field configurations; the Boris, RK4, Higuera-Cary, DOP853, and Tao explicit symplectic integrators; the Stage-1 physics-informed neural-network training (including the vector-potential light-cone laser surrogate); and the methodological studies (order of convergence and the binding-constant Floquet resonances). Version 1.1 adds the Higuera-Cary comparator, direct Poincare-Cartan loop-invariant and energy-drift diagnostics, the realized-order/shadow-Hamiltonian and exact-monodromy (k mod 3) studies, and the Kaggle GPU kernels for the throughput benchmark, surrogate scaling/ablation, multi-seed statistics, the architecture sweep, and the pulse-duration parametric surrogate.
